testcase.name: test_public_verify_valid_no_auth
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_toplotto_v7.py:87: in sample_ticket assert r.status_code in (200, 201), r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","currency"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"machann_id":"cd9f3bab-79bf-4be9-b57f-3f78baa922dd","lottery_id":"2b48f860-91e6-449b-bea9-06fe6af30123","draw_date":"2099-12-31","customer_name":"TEST V7 PubVerify","items":[{"type":"bolet","numbers":"12","amount":10}]}},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","items",0,"game"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"type":"bolet","numbers":"12","amount":10}},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","items",0,"number"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"type":"bolet","numbers":"12","amount":10}}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_push_test_super_admin_returns_sent_cleaned

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
